stemHtml: For radar identification purposes, the controller is requesting to fly left, heading 240°. What is the correct readback?

options.a: Left heading two four zero degrees to identify, CALL SIGN.
options.b: Left heading two four zero (degrees), CALL SIGN.
options.c: Heading two fourty degrees, CALL SIGN.
options.d: Heading two four zero, CALL SIGN.
